title: No Death Animation
description: Removes the death animation tilt on players.
body:
No Death Animation!

This mod removes the death animation tilt which occurs on dead players. --- ### Information: **Red Death Overlay** This mod also allows you to customise the duration of the red death overlay ### Preview: ![BeforeVsAfterGif](https://i.ibb.co/XLpS4X8/No-Death-Animation-ezgif-com-video-to-gif-converter.gif) --- **Credits** - Mod: Walksy - Icon: SakuraFX
